platform_rules.kalshi: Preferred for clean single-position gameline edges when available.
platform_rules.underdog: Only use if 2+ legs independently clear thresholds; no filler rebound legs.

market_context.rebound_market_screen: Primary rebound lines include KAT, Hart, OG, Jalen Johnson, Okongwu, Dyson Daniels.

series_environment.classification: Knicks control vs Hawks pace variance
series_environment.nyk_profile: Concentrated rebound funnels through KAT/Hart/OG with halfcourt control.
series_environment.atl_profile: Distributed rebound ecology; pace and 3PT volume create opportunity but low individual stability.
series_environment.risk_note: ATL rebound legs require extra threshold due to fragmented distribution.

kalshi_single_candidates.action: Playable only if clean single price is fair; not stronger than top rebound edge.

new_rules_decision.best_single: KAT over 11.5 rebounds if platform allows single; otherwise NYK spread on Kalshi if fair.
new_rules_decision.best_2_leg: No clean 2-leg under strict rules because only KAT clears 58%+; Hart is close but below threshold.
new_rules_decision.pass_note: Do not force a second leg. Under CA single-access rules, this is a Kalshi single or KAT-only spot, not an Underdog forced parlay spot.

final_recommendation.primary: KAT O11.5 REB as single if available
final_recommendation.secondary: NYK -6.5 single if Kalshi price is favorable
